subject: fix(mobile): hide context bar and platform strip when bottom sheet is open
body:
When the bottom sheet expands, the ContextBar and Platform Info Strip
were consuming vertical space above and below the canvas, shrinking it.
Now both are hidden when the sheet is open so the canvas fills the full
available space between the header and the bottom sheet.

Tags: mobile, ui, layout
Complexity: 1

Impact: user-facing
